2604.20806.title: OMIBench: Benchmarking Olympiad-Level Multi-Image Reasoning in Large Vision-Language Model
2604.20806.paper_summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have made substantial advances in reasoning tasks at the Olympiad level. Nevertheless, current Olympiad-level multimodal reasoning benchmarks for these models often emphasize single-image analysis and fail to exploit contextual information across multiple images. We present OMIBench, a benchmark designed to evaluate Olympiad-level reasoning when the required evidence is distributed over multiple images. It contains problems from biology, chemistry, mathematics, and physics Olympiads, together with manually annotated rationales and evaluation protocols for both exact and semantic answer matching. Across extensive experiments on OMIBench, we observe meaningful performance gaps in existing models. Even the strongest LVLMs, such as Gemini-3-Pro, attain only about 50% on the benchmark. These results position OMIBench as a focused resources for studying and improving multi-image reasoning in LVLMs.
2604.20806.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺語言模型（LVLMs）在奧林匹克級別的推理任務上取得了實質性的進展。<lb/>然而，目前針對這些模型的奧林匹克級別多模態推理基準往往強調單圖像分析，並未充分利用跨多圖像的上下文信息。<lb/>我們提出了OMIBench，一個旨在評估當所需證據分佈在多個圖像上時的奧林匹克級別推理的基準。<lb/>它包含來自生物學、化學、數學和物理奧林匹克的問題，以及手動標註的推理過程和精確及語義答案匹配的評估協議。<lb/>在對OMIBench的廣泛實驗中，我們觀察到現有模型之間存在顯著的性能差距。<lb/>即使是最強的LVLM，如Gemini-3-Pro，在基準上也僅達到約50%的表現。<lb/>這些結果使OMIBench成為研究和改善LVLMs中多圖像推理的專注資源。
2604.20806.author: Qiguang Chen et.al.
2604.20806.authors: Qiguang Chen, Chengyu Luan, Jiajun Wu, Qiming Yu, Yi Yang, Yizhuo Li, Jingqi Tong, Xiachong Feng, Libo Qin, Wanxiang Che
